description.zh-Hans: 快速生成待机呼吸、漂浮、震动、跳跃、受击、环绕和摆动等像素游戏动作。
description.en: Generates reusable pixel-game motions such as idle, float, shake, hop, hit, orbit and pendulum.

triggers.zh-Hans: 待机动画, 呼吸动画, 受击动画, 漂浮, 跳跃, 震动
triggers.en: idle animation, breathing, hit reaction, float, hop, shake

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 将四个输出直接连接到动画变换节点的对应输入。
exampleUsage.en: Connect the four outputs directly to the matching Animated Transform inputs.
